productName: Permanent Gas ( I/H ) - Plaid Jacket BHO Cured Resin Disposable 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries Permanent Gas in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of diesel, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
